title: Title: AtomLogic v3.2 Universal SOTA - 1.15 BPB Target
author: Evreu1pro

data.description: Uses 20 iterations of a shared block to maximize depth without storage overhead.
Uses 32 sparse experts with binary masks on shared weights.

parameters.description: Vector-based Random Matrix Adaptation for zero-leakage test-time training

novel_contributions: Universal Transformer with 20 iterations of a shared block
Value-only MoE with 32 sparse experts using binary masks on shared weights
VeRA-based test-time training for zero-leakage adaptation
Muon optimizer with float32 Newton-Schulz stability
